reason: All 21 FRs have >=1 test, all 24 cross-cutting tests from SRS §6 present, naming convention consistent, unit/integration separation correct, no orphan FRs. Minor: FR-09 lacks explicit pii_types field test, FR-14 lacks 500ms timing test.
